title: A Roof Over Their Heads
headline: The people demand homes!
body: Chief, too many of us sleep on bare ground beneath open sky. The grumbling by the fires has turned to anger — a person with no door of their own feels they belong to no one. They will not labor willingly much longer unless we raise proper homes.
prompt: Choose how the settlement will shelter its people.

choices.label: We'll raise homes for all.
choices.description: Unlock the craft of building and put a roof over every head. No one sleeps in the open once the work is done.
choices.outcome: The settlement turns to building. Thatch is cut, doors are hung, and beds are claimed.

objectives.label: Research Housing
substeps: Open the Town Hall research screen.
This unlocks Housing Orders and thatch building parts.

objectives.label: House every citizen
substeps: Use Housing Orders to plan homes (roof, door, window, a bed each).
Build until every citizen has an assigned home.
Homeless citizens grow steadily unhappier the longer they wait.
